sentences.arabic: كَانَ الشِّعْرُ قَدِيمًا هُوَ دِيوَانُ الْعَرَبِ.
sentences.translation: Poezija je historijski bila arhiv Arapa.
sentences.translationEn: Poetry was historically the record of the Arabs.

sentences.arabic: فِيهِ يَكْتُبُ الشُّعَرَاءُ عَنْ مَشَاعِرِهِمْ وَطَبِيعَةِ بِلَادِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: U njoj pjesnici pišu o svojim osjećanjima i prirodi svoje zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: In it, poets write about their feelings and the nature of their lands.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الشَّاعِرُ كَلِمَاتٍ جَمِيلَةً وَمُوسِيقَى خَاصَّةً.
sentences.translation: Pjesnik koristi lijepe riječi i posebnu muziku.
sentences.translationEn: The poet uses beautiful words and special music.

sentences.arabic: الْيَوْمَ، نَقْرَأُ الْقَصَائِدَ لِنَفْهَمَ تَارِيخَ اللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Danas čitamo pjesme kako bismo razumjeli historiju arapskog jezika.
sentences.translationEn: Today, we read poems to understand the history of the Arabic language.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نُحِبُّ الْقَافِيَةَ وَالْوَزْنَ فِي هَذِهِ الْأَبْيَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Volimo rimu i metriku u ovim stihovima.
sentences.translationEn: We love the rhyme and meter in these verses.
